summary: Benchmark design research complete. Designed 700-formula stratified benchmark (50% valid/invalid, 4 difficulty tiers, 3 frame classes), defined primary metrics (SR@K, NV, TTP, PL), characterized the SuccessPatterns.lean heuristic baseline (PatternDatabase with 5-field PatternKey, strategy-frequency heuristic), and documented TABLEAUX/CADE publication conventions with concrete implementation phases.

artifacts.summary: Full benchmark design report: formula selection strategy, difficulty tiers aligned with existing DatasetGenerator.lean tiers, primary/secondary metrics definitions, SuccessPatterns baseline characterization, TABLEAUX/CADE publication format, and 4-phase Python implementation roadmap.
